---
title: "Custom Comparison Report: IF2 vs. DMOP"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
execute:
  daemon: false
---

```{python}
# | label: setup
# | echo: false
import os
import logging
import glob
import pickle
from datetime import datetime

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from plotnine import *
from IPython.display import display, Markdown

import pypomp as pp
import jax

# Hide the noisy JAX CUDA initialization error on machines without a GPU
logging.getLogger("jax._src.xla_bridge").setLevel(logging.CRITICAL)

LONG = os.environ.get("LONG", "false").lower() in ("true", "1", "yes")
suffix = "_long" if LONG else ""

print("Report generated on:", datetime.now())
```

# 1. Raincloud Plot of Final Log-Likelihoods (N_MONITORS=1)

This plot shows the distribution of the final evaluation pfilter log-likelihoods across the replicates for each model with $N\_MONITORS=1$.

```{python}
# | label: plot-raincloud-nm1
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 6
# | echo: false

all_reps_loglik = []
model_files_nm1 = [
    ("IF2", f"mif_results/dacca_results_rl4_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-1", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha1.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-0.97", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.97_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-0", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
]

for label, f in model_files_nm1:
    try:
        with open(f, "rb") as pf:
            obj = pickle.load(pf)
            res = obj.results(index=-2)

            if "loglik" in res.columns:
                res = res.rename(columns={"loglik": "logLik"})
            if "theta_idx" in res.columns:
                res = res.rename(columns={"theta_idx": "rep"})

            df_lbl = pd.DataFrame(
                {"rep": res["rep"], "logLik": res["logLik"], "Model": label}
            )
            all_reps_loglik.append(df_lbl)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error loading/processing {f}: {e}")

if all_reps_loglik:
    df_raincloud = pd.concat(all_reps_loglik, ignore_index=True)

    # Filter out extreme outliers (logLik < -3780) for better visualization, as done in the original report
    outliers = df_raincloud[df_raincloud["logLik"] < -3780]
    if not outliers.empty:
        display(Markdown("#### Values filtered out (logLik < -3780):"))
        display(Markdown(outliers.to_markdown(index=False)))

    df_raincloud_filtered = df_raincloud[df_raincloud["logLik"] >= -3780].copy()

    # Convert Model to categorical for consistent ordering and default colors
    df_raincloud_filtered["Model"] = pd.Categorical(
        df_raincloud_filtered["Model"],
        categories=["IFAD-0", "IFAD-0.97", "IFAD-1", "IF2"],
        ordered=True,
    )

    # Precompute offset positions for horizontal raincloud layout
    model_map = {"IFAD-0": 0.0, "IFAD-0.97": 1.0, "IFAD-1": 2.0, "IF2": 3.0}
    df_raincloud_filtered["Model_num"] = (
        df_raincloud_filtered["Model"].map(model_map).astype(float)
    )

    # Shift violin baseline slightly up, boxplot down, and jitter further down
    df_raincloud_filtered["Model_violin_x"] = df_raincloud_filtered["Model_num"] + 0.05
    df_raincloud_filtered["Model_boxplot_x"] = df_raincloud_filtered["Model_num"] - 0.1

    # Custom jitter centered below the boxplot (Model_num - 0.30)
    np.random.seed(42)
    df_raincloud_filtered["Model_jitter_x"] = (
        df_raincloud_filtered["Model_num"]
        - 0.30
        + np.random.uniform(-0.04, 0.04, size=len(df_raincloud_filtered))
    )

    # Calculate the max log-likelihood for reference line
    max_loglik = df_raincloud_filtered["logLik"].max()

    # Calculate major ticks every 10 units dynamically
    min_loglik_tick = int(np.floor(df_raincloud_filtered["logLik"].min() / 10) * 10)
    max_loglik_tick = int(np.ceil(df_raincloud_filtered["logLik"].max() / 10) * 10)
    tick_breaks = list(range(min_loglik_tick, max_loglik_tick + 10, 10))

    # Build premium raincloud plot using geom_violin(style='right') in plotnine (if supported)
    p = (
        ggplot(df_raincloud_filtered, aes(y="logLik", fill="Model", color="Model"))
        + geom_violin(
            aes(x="Model_violin_x", group="Model"),
            style="right",
            width=1.0,
            alpha=0.6,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_boxplot(
            aes(x="Model_boxplot_x", group="Model"),
            width=0.10,
            alpha=0.6,
            color="black",
            outlier_alpha=0,
            size=0.8,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_point(aes(x="Model_jitter_x"), alpha=0.6, size=1.5, show_legend=False)
        + geom_hline(
            yintercept=max_loglik, color="red", linetype="dotted", size=1.2, alpha=0.9
        )
        + coord_flip()
        + scale_x_continuous(
            breaks=[0, 1, 2, 3], labels=["IFAD-0", "IFAD-0.97", "IFAD-1", "IF2"]
        )
        + scale_y_continuous(breaks=tick_breaks)
        + labs(
            title="",
            subtitle="",
            x="",
            y="Log-Likelihood",
        )
        + theme_minimal()
        + theme(
            axis_text_x=element_text(size=14, color="black"),
            axis_text_y=element_text(size=14, color="black"),
            axis_title_x=element_text(size=15, color="black"),
            axis_title_y=element_text(size=15, color="black"),
            panel_grid_major_y=element_blank(),
            panel_grid_minor_y=element_blank(),
            panel_grid_major_x=element_line(color="#e5e5e5", size=0.8),
            panel_grid_minor_x=element_blank(),
        )
    )
    p.save(f"../../imgs/precise_raincloud{suffix}.pdf", width=7, height=3.8, verbose=False)
    display(p)
else:
    print("No data available to plot.")
```

# 2. Runtime Comparison Table (N_MONITORS=0)

The table below shows the runtimes for each model component (`mif`, `train`, `pfilter`) and the total time taken for the models with $N\_MONITORS=0$.

```{python}
# | label: time-table-nm0
# | echo: false

runtimes = []
model_files_nm0 = [
    ("IFAD-0", "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.0_nm0.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-0.97", "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.97_nm0.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-1", "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha1.0_nm0.pkl"),
    ("IF2", "mif_results/dacca_results_rl4_nm0.pkl"),
]

for label, f in model_files_nm0:
    try:
        with open(f, "rb") as pf:
            obj = pickle.load(pf)
            t_df = obj.time()
            row = {"Model": label}
            
            mif_t = t_df.loc[t_df["method"] == "mif", "time"].sum()
            train_t = t_df.loc[t_df["method"] == "train", "time"].sum()
            pfilter_t = t_df.loc[t_df["method"] == "pfilter", "time"].sum()
            
            if LONG:
                if label == "IF2":
                    mif_t *= 4
                else:
                    train_t *= 4
            
            row["mif (s)"] = f"{mif_t:.2f}" if mif_t > 0 else "-"
            row["train (s)"] = f"{train_t:.2f}" if train_t > 0 else "-"
            row["pfilter (s)"] = f"{pfilter_t:.2f}" if pfilter_t > 0 else "-"
            row["Total Time (s)"] = f"{(mif_t + train_t + pfilter_t):.2f}"
            runtimes.append(row)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error loading runtime from {f}: {e}")

if runtimes:
    df_runtimes = pd.DataFrame(runtimes)
    display(Markdown(df_runtimes.to_markdown(index=False)))
else:
    print("No runtime data available.")
```

# 3. LogLik Traces Comparison (N_MONITORS=1, Time-Scaled)

This section shows the log-likelihood search traces for the $N\_MONITORS=1$ models. 
The x-axis represents execution time in seconds, **scaled by the execution runtimes of their corresponding $N\_MONITORS=0$ runs**. The `mif` (IF2) part and the `train` (DMOP/training) part of each model's trace are scaled independently by their respective $N\_MONITORS=0$ component runtimes.

```{python}
# | label: plot-nm1-comparison-time-scaled
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 6
# | echo: false

files = [
    (
        "IFAD-0",
        f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl",
        "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.0_nm0.pkl",
    ),
    (
        "IFAD-0.97",
        f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.97_nm1{suffix}.pkl",
        "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.97_nm0.pkl",
    ),
    (
        "IFAD-1",
        f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha1.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl",
        "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha1.0_nm0.pkl",
    ),
    (
        "IF2",
        f"mif_results/dacca_results_rl4_nm1{suffix}.pkl",
        "mif_results/dacca_results_rl4_nm0.pkl",
    ),
]

all_stats = []
best_loglik_all = -np.inf

for label, nm1_f, nm0_f in files:
    try:
        # 1. Load N_MONITORS=0 component runtimes
        with open(nm0_f, "rb") as pf:
            obj_nm0 = pickle.load(pf)
            time_df = obj_nm0.time()
            t_mif = time_df.loc[time_df["method"] == "mif", "time"].sum()
            t_train = time_df.loc[time_df["method"] == "train", "time"].sum()
            
            if LONG:
                if label == "IF2":
                    t_mif *= 4
                else:
                    t_train *= 4

        # 2. Load N_MONITORS=1 traces
        with open(nm1_f, "rb") as pf:
            obj_nm1 = pickle.load(pf)
            t = obj_nm1.traces().copy()

            if "loglik" in t.columns:
                t = t.rename(columns={"loglik": "logLik"})
            if "theta_idx" in t.columns:
                t = t.rename(columns={"theta_idx": "rep"})
            if "iteration" not in t.columns:
                t = t.rename(columns={"iter": "iteration"})

            # Track overall best log-likelihood across loaded final pfilter evaluations
            res_nm1 = obj_nm1.results(index=-2)
            if not res_nm1.empty:
                if "loglik" in res_nm1.columns:
                    res_nm1 = res_nm1.rename(columns={"loglik": "logLik"})
                max_in_run = res_nm1["logLik"].max()
                if max_in_run > best_loglik_all:
                    best_loglik_all = max_in_run

            if "method" not in t.columns:
                t["method"] = "mif"

            t = t[t["method"].isin(["mif", "train"])]

            # 3. Calculate scaling parameters
            mif_t_df = t[t["method"] == "mif"]
            max_mif_iter = mif_t_df["iteration"].max() if not mif_t_df.empty else 1
            if max_mif_iter == 0:
                max_mif_iter = 1

            train_t_df = t[t["method"] == "train"]
            if not train_t_df.empty:
                min_train_iter = train_t_df["iteration"].min()
                max_train_iter = train_t_df["iteration"].max()
                train_range = max_train_iter - min_train_iter
                if train_range == 0:
                    train_range = 1
            else:
                min_train_iter = 0
                max_train_iter = 0
                train_range = 1

            # Scale iteration step to physical seconds of N_MONITORS=0 run
            def get_scaled_time(row):
                method = row["method"]
                it = row["iteration"]
                if method == "mif":
                    return it * (t_mif / max_mif_iter)
                elif method == "train":
                    return t_mif + (it - min_train_iter) * (t_train / train_range)
                else:
                    return np.nan

            t["time_scaled"] = t.apply(get_scaled_time, axis=1)

            # Drop rows with NaN logLik before grouping to avoid NaNs in percentiles/median due to initial parameter value rows at IF2/train transition.
            dropped_rows = t[t["logLik"].isna()]
            if not dropped_rows.empty:
                cols_to_print = [
                    c
                    for c in ["method", "iteration", "rep", "logLik"]
                    if c in t.columns
                ]
                print(f"Dropped {len(dropped_rows)} rows with NaN logLik for {label}:")
                print(dropped_rows[cols_to_print].head(5).to_string(index=False))
                if len(dropped_rows) > 5:
                    print("...")

                # Check how many do not occur at iteration 0 or the transition point (max_mif_iter)
                unexpected_dropped = dropped_rows[
                    ~dropped_rows["iteration"].isin([0, max_mif_iter])
                ]
                print(
                    f"  - {len(unexpected_dropped)} of these did not occur at iteration 0 or transition iteration {max_mif_iter}."
                )
                if not unexpected_dropped.empty:
                    print("  Unexpected dropped rows:")
                    print(
                        unexpected_dropped[cols_to_print].head(5).to_string(index=False)
                    )
                    if len(unexpected_dropped) > 5:
                        print("  ...")

            t_clean = t.dropna(subset=["logLik"])

            # Compute median and percentiles
            stats = (
                t_clean.groupby(["method", "iteration", "time_scaled"])["logLik"]
                .agg(
                    median="median",
                    q10=lambda x: np.percentile(x, 10),
                    qmax=lambda x: np.percentile(x, 100),
                )
                .reset_index()
            )

            stats["source"] = label
            all_stats.append(stats)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error loading/processing {nm1_f} or {nm0_f}: {e}")

if all_stats:
    df_stats = pd.concat(all_stats, ignore_index=True)
    df_stats["source"] = pd.Categorical(
        df_stats["source"],
        categories=["IFAD-0", "IFAD-0.97", "IFAD-1", "IF2"],
        ordered=True,
    )
    df_stats["method"] = pd.Categorical(
        df_stats["method"], categories=["mif", "train"], ordered=True
    )

    # Extract the transition points (first training iteration with non-null log-likelihood) for each DMOP model
    df_transition = pd.DataFrame()
    df_train_only = df_stats[
        (df_stats["method"] == "train") & (df_stats["median"].notna())
    ]
    if not df_train_only.empty:
        df_transition = df_train_only.loc[
            df_train_only.groupby("source", observed=True)["time_scaled"].idxmin()
        ]

    # Plot 1: Standard Y-axis Zoom
    p1 = (
        ggplot(
            df_stats,
            aes(x="time_scaled", y="median", color="source"),
        )
        + geom_line(size=1)
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="q10", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] != "IF2"],
            alpha=0.2,
            size=0.5,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="qmax", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] != "IF2"],
            alpha=0.2,
            size=0.5,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="q10", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] == "IF2"],
            alpha=0.35,
            size=0.5,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="qmax", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] == "IF2"],
            alpha=0.35,
            size=0.5,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_ribbon(
            aes(ymin="q10", ymax="qmax", fill="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] != "IF2"],
            alpha=0.1,
            color=None,
        )
        + geom_ribbon(
            aes(ymin="q10", ymax="qmax", fill="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] == "IF2"],
            alpha=0.1,
            color=None,
        )
        + geom_hline(
            yintercept=best_loglik_all,
            color="red",
            linetype="dotted",
            size=1.2,
            alpha=0.9,
        )
        + labs(
            title="LogLik Traces Comparison (N_MONITORS=1)",
            subtitle="Median with 10% and 100% percentiles (X-axis Scaled by N_MONITORS=0 Runtime)",
            x="Elapsed Time (Seconds)",
            y="logLik",
        )
        + theme_minimal()
        + coord_cartesian(ylim=(-4000, None))
    )
    if not df_transition.empty:
        p1 = p1 + geom_vline(
            aes(xintercept="time_scaled", color="source"),
            data=df_transition,
            linetype="dotted",
            size=1.0,
            show_legend=False,
        )
    display(p1)

    # Plot 2: Close-up Zoom (Manuscript Version)
    p2 = (
        ggplot(
            df_stats,
            aes(x="time_scaled", y="median", color="source"),
        )
        + geom_line(size=1.2)
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="q10", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] != "IF2"],
            alpha=0.2,
            size=0.6,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="qmax", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] != "IF2"],
            alpha=0.2,
            size=0.6,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="q10", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] == "IF2"],
            alpha=0.35,
            size=0.6,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_line(
            aes(y="qmax", color="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] == "IF2"],
            alpha=0.35,
            size=0.6,
            show_legend=False,
        )
        + geom_ribbon(
            aes(ymin="q10", ymax="qmax", fill="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] != "IF2"],
            alpha=0.1,
            color=None,
        )
        + geom_ribbon(
            aes(ymin="q10", ymax="qmax", fill="source"),
            data=df_stats[df_stats["source"] == "IF2"],
            alpha=0.1,
            color=None,
        )
        + geom_hline(
            yintercept=best_loglik_all,
            color="red",
            linetype="dotted",
            size=1.2,
            alpha=0.9,
        )
        + labs(
            title="",
            subtitle="",
            x="Elapsed Time (Seconds)",
            y="Log-Likelihood",
        )
        + theme_minimal()
        + theme(
            axis_text_x=element_text(size=14, color="black"),
            axis_text_y=element_text(size=14, color="black"),
            axis_title_x=element_text(size=15, color="black"),
            axis_title_y=element_text(size=15, color="black"),
            legend_text=element_text(size=12, color="black"),
            legend_title=element_blank(),
            legend_position="right",
            panel_grid_major=element_line(color="#e5e5e5", size=0.8),
            panel_grid_minor=element_blank(),
        )
        + coord_cartesian(ylim=(-3800, None))
    )
    if not df_transition.empty:
        p2 = p2 + geom_vline(
            aes(xintercept="time_scaled", color="source"),
            data=df_transition,
            linetype="dotted",
            size=1.0,
            show_legend=False,
        )
    p2.save(f"../../imgs/precise_traces{suffix}.pdf", width=7, height=3.8, verbose=False)
    display(p2)

    # Compute and display Summary Statistics Table
    summary_data = []
    for source, group in df_stats.groupby("source"):
        final_iter = group["iteration"].max()
        final_row = group[group["iteration"] == final_iter].iloc[0]
        max_loglik = group["qmax"].max()

        summary_data.append(
            {
                "Model": source,
                "Final Median LogLik": f"{final_row['median']:.2f}",
                "Final Max LogLik": f"{final_row['qmax']:.2f}",
            }
        )

    def to_markdown_table(data):
        if not data:
            return ""
        headers = list(data[0].keys())
        header_row = "| " + " | ".join(headers) + " |"
        separator_row = "| " + " | ".join(["---"] * len(headers)) + " |"
        data_rows = []
        for row in data:
            data_rows.append("| " + " | ".join(str(row[h]) for h in headers) + " |")
        return "\n".join([header_row, separator_row] + data_rows)

    display(Markdown("\n### Summary Statistics for N_MONITORS=1 Models"))
    display(Markdown(to_markdown_table(summary_data)))
else:
    print("No N_MONITORS=1 files found.")
```

# 4. Parameter Estimate Density Plots (N_MONITORS=1)

This section shows density plots of final parameter estimates across the replicates for each model with $N\_MONITORS=1$. Dotted red lines represent the default parameters.

```{python}
# | label: plot-param-density-nm1
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 7
# | echo: false

all_params = []
model_files_nm1 = [
    ("IFAD-0", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-0.97", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.97_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-1", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha1.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IF2", f"mif_results/dacca_results_rl4_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
]

for label, f in model_files_nm1:
    try:
        with open(f, "rb") as pf:
            obj = pickle.load(pf)
            t = obj.traces().copy()
            
            if "loglik" in t.columns:
                t = t.rename(columns={"loglik": "logLik"})
            if "theta_idx" in t.columns:
                t = t.rename(columns={"theta_idx": "rep"})
            if "iteration" not in t.columns:
                t = t.rename(columns={"iter": "iteration"})

            id_cols = ["rep", "iteration", "logLik", "method"]
            id_cols = [c for c in id_cols if c in t.columns]
            param_cols = [c for c in t.columns if c not in id_cols and c not in ["c", "omega", "rho"]]
            
            t_long = t.melt(
                id_vars=id_cols,
                value_vars=param_cols,
                var_name="quantity",
                value_name="param_value",
            )
            
            last_iter = t_long["iteration"].max()
            final_p = t_long[t_long["iteration"] == last_iter].copy()
            final_p["source"] = label
            all_params.append(final_p)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error loading {f}: {e}")

if all_params:
    df_params = pd.concat(all_params, ignore_index=True)
    df_params["source"] = pd.Categorical(
        df_params["source"],
        categories=["IFAD-0", "IFAD-0.97", "IFAD-1", "IF2"],
        ordered=True
    )
    
    default_theta = pp.models.dacca().theta[0]
    default_params_df = pd.DataFrame([default_theta]).melt(
        var_name="quantity", value_name="default_value"
    )
    
    quantities = sorted(df_params["quantity"].unique())

    for i in range(0, len(quantities), 4):
        q_subset = quantities[i : i + 4]
        p = (
            ggplot(
                df_params[df_params["quantity"].isin(q_subset)],
                aes(x="param_value", fill="source", color="source"),
            )
            + geom_density(alpha=0.4)
            + geom_vline(
                default_params_df[default_params_df["quantity"].isin(q_subset)],
                aes(xintercept="default_value"),
                color="red",
                linetype="dotted",
                size=1,
                inherit_aes=False,
            )
            + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free", ncol=2)
            + scale_x_continuous(labels=lambda l: [f"{x:g}" for x in l])
            + scale_y_continuous(labels=lambda l: [f"{x:g}" for x in l])
            + theme_minimal()
            + theme(axis_text_x=element_text(size=8), axis_text_y=element_text(size=8))
            + labs(
                x="estimate",
                title=f"Final parameter estimates (N_MONITORS=1): Comparison (Part {i // 4 + 1})",
            )
        )
        display(p)
else:
    print("No parameter data available.")
```

# 5. Best Log-Likelihoods (N_MONITORS=0 & N_MONITORS=1)

This section displays the log-likelihood statistics obtained from the final pfilter evaluations across the replicates for both the $N\_MONITORS=0$ and $N\_MONITORS=1$ runs.

To ensure consistency and transparency, we report:
1. **Best LogLik (Post-Pruned, index=-1)**: The fresh, unbiased evaluation of the single selected best replicate.

2. **Best LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2)**: The maximum evaluation among all 100 replicates before pruning. (Note: Due to selection bias/the winner's curse and particle filter stochasticity, the maximum value in `index=-2` may appear slightly higher than the fresh evaluation in `index=-1`).

3. **Median LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2)**: The median evaluation across all 100 replicates.

### N_MONITORS = 0 Models

```{python}
# | label: best-loglik-nm0
# | echo: false

def get_stats(model_files):
    stats_list = []
    for label, f in model_files:
        try:
            with open(f, "rb") as pf:
                obj = pickle.load(pf)
                # 1. Best LogLik from the very last pfilter entry (post-pruned, most accurate)
                res_last = obj.results(index=-1)
                if "loglik" in res_last.columns:
                    res_last = res_last.rename(columns={"loglik": "logLik"})
                best_ll_post = res_last["logLik"].max()

                # 2. Pre-pruned pfilter entry (across all search replicates)
                res_pre = obj.results(index=-2)
                if "loglik" in res_pre.columns:
                    res_pre = res_pre.rename(columns={"loglik": "logLik"})
                best_ll_pre = res_pre["logLik"].max()
                median_ll_pre = res_pre["logLik"].median()

                stats_list.append(
                    {
                        "Model": label,
                        "Best LogLik (Post-Pruned, index=-1)": f"{best_ll_post:.2f}",
                        "Best LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2)": f"{best_ll_pre:.2f}",
                        "Median LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2)": f"{median_ll_pre:.2f}",
                    }
                )
        except Exception as e:
            stats_list.append({"Model": label, "Error": str(e)})
    return pd.DataFrame(stats_list)

model_files_nm0 = [
    ("IFAD-0", "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.0_nm0.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-0.97", "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.97_nm0.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-1", "dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha1.0_nm0.pkl"),
    ("IF2", "mif_results/dacca_results_rl4_nm0.pkl"),
]

df_nm0 = get_stats(model_files_nm0)
display(Markdown(df_nm0.to_markdown(index=False)))
```

### N_MONITORS = 1 Models

```{python}
# | label: best-loglik-nm1
# | echo: false

model_files_nm1_eval = [
    ("IFAD-0", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-0.97", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha0.97_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IFAD-1", f"dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4_alpha1.0_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
    ("IF2", f"mif_results/dacca_results_rl4_nm1{suffix}.pkl"),
]

df_nm1 = get_stats(model_files_nm1_eval)
display(Markdown(df_nm1.to_markdown(index=False)))
```
